subject: [MARIADB][COMMON] Add support for mariadb-operator
commit_message:
[MARIADB][COMMON] Add support for mariadb-operator

Add template for the mariadb-operator

Issue-ID: OOM-3236
Change-Id: Ie83fdd9c6d5fa802d88c592b449a7ff8553c2cd8
Signed-off-by: sanket12345 <SX00562924@techmahindra.com>
